scripts.build: mkdir -p dist && CGO_ENABLED=1 CGO_CFLAGS="${CGO_CFLAGS:+$CGO_CFLAGS }-Wno-error=missing-braces" go build -tags sqlite_fts5 -o dist/wacli ./cmd/wacli
scripts.test: pnpm -s test:go && pnpm -s test:fts && pnpm -s test:windows-lock && pnpm -s test:cgo-required && pnpm -s test:docs
scripts.test:windows-lock: bash -euc 'tmp="${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/wacli-lock-windows.test.exe"; trap "rm -f \"$tmp\"" EXIT; GOOS=windows GOARCH=amd64 go test -c ./internal/lock -o "$tmp"'
scripts.test:cgo-required: bash -c 'set +e; out=$(CGO_ENABLED=0 go build ./cmd/wacli 2>&1); status=$?; set -e; echo "$out" | grep -q wacli_requires_cgo_enabled_1_for_go_sqlite3; test $status -ne 0'
scripts.format:check: bash -lc 'out=$(gofmt -l .); if [ -n "$out" ]; then echo "$out"; exit 1; fi'
